title: Viljandi, Viljandi County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Viljandi, Viljandi County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Viljandi is a city in Viljandi County with a population of 17,000. A charming town in southern Estonia, known for the picturesque Viljandi Castle ruins, the annual Viljandi Folk Music Festival, and the beautiful Lake Viljandi.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
